title: Polur temple, Kozhikode
tagline: Polur temple, Kozhikode — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Polur Subramanya Swamy Temple of Kozhikode, once the capital of Zamorin of India, is one of the area's oldest temples.
overview.description: Polur Subramanya Swamy Temple of Kozhikode, once the capital of Zamorin of India, is one of the area's oldest temples. This temple is located 12 km away from Kozhikode city in the Indian state of Kerala and 3 km away from Parambil Bazar and Muzhikkal. The exact place is Polor in Kuruvattoor Panchayath.

topPlaces.name: Parambil Bazar
topPlaces.description: Kuruvattur is a village in Kozhikode district in the state of Kerala, India. It is 14 km (8.7 mi) from Kozhikode (Calicut) city.

topPlaces.name: Moozhikkal
topPlaces.description: Moozhikkal is a small town on Wayanad Road in Kozhikode East, Kerala, India. Moozhikkal is administered by Kozhikode Corporation which is a local city council here.

topPlaces.name: Kiralur
topPlaces.description: Kiralur is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Marikkunnu
topPlaces.description: Marikkunnu (മേരിക്കുന്ന്) and Vellimadukunnu are two close places and suburban residential areas located on the periphery of Kozhikode in Kerala, India. Nirmala Hospital, JDT Islam Institutions and Government Law College, Kozhikode are located in this place.

topPlaces.name: Karuvanthuruthy
topPlaces.description: Karuvanthuruthy is a census town in Kozhikode district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Kizhakkummuri
topPlaces.description: Kizhakkummuri is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Muttanchery
topPlaces.description: Muttanchery is a village in Kozhikode district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is part of Madavoor Grama Panchayat in Koduvally block.

topPlaces.name: Kunnamangalam
topPlaces.description: Kunnamangalam is a growing census town located about 14 km east of Kozhikode city on National highway 766. Nearby places are Koduvally, Mukkam, Chathamangalam, and Kattangal.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Polur temple, Kozhikode?
faq.a: The best time to visit Polur temple, Kozhikode is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Polur temple, Kozhikode?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (23 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (128 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Polur temple, Kozhikode?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Polur temple, Kozhikode at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Polur temple, Kozhikode?
faq.a: Stays in Polur temple, Kozhikode start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Polur temple, Kozhikode?
faq.a: The top attractions are Parambil Bazar, Moozhikkal, Kiralur, Marikkunnu, Karuvanthuruthy.
